mapper.select: SELECT messages_json FROM chatbot_conversation_memory WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chatbot_conversation_memory (conversation_id, messages_json) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{messagesJson}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE messages_json = IF(deleted_at IS NULL, VALUES(messages_json), messages_json)
mapper.update: UPDATE chatbot_conversation_memory SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id FROM chatbot_conversation_memory WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.conversation_id AS conversationId, m.title AS title, s.mode AS mode, m.updated_at AS updatedAt,
(m.application_case_id IS NOT NULL OR s.status = 'PENDING') AS intake FROM chatbot_conversation_memory m LEFT JOIN chatbot_intake_slot s ON s.conversation_id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND (m.title IS NOT NULL OR (m.messages_json IS NOT NULL AND m.messages_json != '[]')) ORDER BY m.updated_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT user_id FROM chatbot_conversation_memory WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT application_case_id FROM chatbot_conversation_memory WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT onboarding_declined_at FROM chatbot_conversation_memory WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE chatbot_conversation_memory SET onboarding_declined_at = NOW() WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE chatbot_conversation_memory SET onboarding_declined_at = NULL WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
